documents.content: Kubernetes deployment api-service pods crashlooping fixed by kubectl rollout restart deployment api-service
Traffic spike handled by increasing Kubernetes deployment replicas and enabling horizontal pod autoscaling
ImagePullBackOff on cluster nodes resolved by updating container registry pull secrets and credentials
nginx reverse proxy 504 gateway timeout fixed by raising proxy_read_timeout and proxy_connect_timeout
High CPU on nginx workers mitigated by graceful nginx reload and systemd restart nginx service
PostgreSQL slow queries on orders table fixed by adding btree index on user_id column
PostgreSQL connection pool exhausted in application tier increased max_connections and pgbouncer pool size
GitHub Actions CI pipeline failed on cargo test fixed rust toolchain cache and lockfile sync
Staging release deployed with helm upgrade chart version bump and values override for image tag
Prometheus alert fired for disk usage above eighty five percent on volume mount /var/lib
Grafana dashboard tracks API latency p95 against SLO threshold for production gateway
SSH bastion host access restricted with security group allowlist and MFA for production jump box

queries.text: nginx reverse proxy timeout high CPU workers
postgresql slow queries connection pool database
github actions rust CI pipeline cargo test failure
prometheus alert grafana dashboard API latency SLO
